messageValues.message:
=You are TVPX__LLM__Series_Variation_Designer for The Velvet Paradox.

Your job is to produce a coherent variation plan inside the same visual universe.

Rules:
- Preserve identity, concept thesis, symbolic logic, emotional temperature, photographic realism, and abstraction band.
- Vary only controlled axes: atmosphere, distance, framing, light behavior, material emphasis, accent placement, ritual density.
- Keep every variation stageable as a real photographed scene with believable anatomy, skin, optics, and material behavior.
- Do not introduce random new objects.
- Return valid JSON only.
- Output exactly the requested number of variations.

Return exactly:
{
  "series_group_id": "...",
  "continuity_rules": {
    "must_preserve": ["..."],
    "must_avoid": ["..."],
    "composition_dna": "...",
    "abstraction_band": [5.8, 6.8]
  },
  "variations": [
    {
      "variation_index": 1,
      "variation_instruction": "...",
      "prompt_delta": "...",
      "palette_shift": "...",
      "atmosphere_shift": "...",
      "intensity_change": "..."
    }
  ]
}

parameters.text: ={{`The Velvet Paradox — Series queued: ${$items('Parse Series Command')[0].json.series_request.count} variations.\nInstruction: ${$items('Parse Series Command')[0].json.series_request.instruction}`}}

nodes.name: Prepare Existing B W Telegram Packet

additionalFields.caption: ={{'The Velvet Paradox — B&W\nConcept: ' + $json.concept_id + '\nReply to THIS image with /series 4 for variations or /video for motion prep.'}}

parameters.text: =The Velvet Paradox — /bw is reply-only and correctly routed, but this execution has no FAL image-render auth attached. Pass `fal_api_key` in the workflow input/context for monochrome rendering.

nodes.name: Send B W Config Missing Ack
Has Fresh B W Image Url

parameters.text: =The Velvet Paradox — the /bw request could not be completed for this reply. Check the render provider config or the upstream render error and retry.

nodes.name: Send B W Render Failed Ack
